title: a couple of questions
wikitext:
[]: a couple of questions....             Quote Post by Jamie the Great » Wed Mar 14, 2007 12:21 am here are two questions that I have been wondering about... 1.) In EoE when the Eva series tears Asuka apart and she is trying to go berserk she keeps repeating, "I'll kill you," but to me what she see's outside of her Eva looks a bit different then what is actually happening. You don't see the Eva series flying above her for example. So, if that is the case, and she isn't really talking about the Eva's then who do you think it is? Is she seeing Rei like everyone else did before they died (assuming Asuka does die in this scene) or could it possibly be her mother, who told Asuka that she wouldn't let her die (thus causing Asuka to find the will to live) but sadly that seems to be a lie.... 2.) Does anyone think that Gendo's soul is inside Unit 00? Like it happened when he tried to rescue Rei and got Adam on his palm? The only reason I think this is because before unit 0 explodes Rei see's Gendo looking at her the way he did when he rescued her and she cries because his soul will be gone. Another reason is that the Eva goes berserk for Rei at one point bt when she has Gendo's glasses that she has she is able to sync with it. What do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Mar 14, 2007 12:35 am 1) The Harpies are indeed in the air. The last time we see them before the scene cuts to the inside of Eva-02 (cropped): 2) He didn't have Adam in his hand sometime after ep08, and Eva-00 has been operational before that. Rei seeing Gendo in ep23 is probably because, for this incarnation of Rei, Gendo was the most important thing in her life. You can see Eva-00 "reaching" for him, presumably reacting to Rei doing this within the plug. There's really nothing substantial to indicate Gendo lost part of his soul inside Eva-00.

[]: Re: a couple of questions....             Quote Post by TriLink » Wed Mar 14, 2007 5:04 pm Jamie the Great wrote: here are two questions that I have been wondering about... 1.) In EoE when the Eva series tears Asuka apart and she is trying to go berserk she keeps repeating, "I'll kill you," but to me what she see's outside of her Eva looks a bit different then what is actually happening. You don't see the Eva series flying above her for example. So, if that is the case, and she isn't really talking about the Eva's then who do you think it is? Is she seeing Rei like everyone else did before they died (assuming Asuka does die in this scene)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 15, 2007 12:05 pm It's possible it could be Kyoko* saying that to Asuka since Kyoko was in the one in control of Asuka's final battle (Bridge theory and all that), but I personally think it's just Asuka herself saying that to the Harpies. *I'm of the theory that Kyoko DID want to protect Asuka, but she knew that dying together would be the ironic ending of it, after all. For those of you who have NO IDEA what I'm talking about, see here: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2449

[]:             Quote Post by C4 » Thu Mar 15, 2007 5:39 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: It's possible it could be Kyoko* saying that to Asuka since Kyoko was in the one in control of Asuka's final battle (Bridge theory and all that), but I personally think it's just Asuka herself saying that to the Harpies.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 15, 2007 5:59 pm C4 wrote: Misato, to my recollection, is the only dying person that she appears to before 3I starts and everyone starts getting tanged. I don't think there's any reason to assume that anyone else before 3I saw Rei on their deathbed.

[]:             Quote Post by C4 » Thu Mar 15, 2007 6:05 pm Ornette wrote: Rei appears right after Ritsuko gets shot (as she's falling backwards into the LCL).

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Thu Mar 15, 2007 6:42 pm C4 wrote: I definitely don't think the movie, which explicitly showed Rei being appearing before Misato, would for some reason or another, move Asuka's vision of Rei to off camera, or make her otherwise invisible to the audience. And besides, even if she is dying, and no doubt in an extreme emotional state, don't you think Asuka would have been the least bit surprised if she all of a sudden saw Rei just floating around? It's not like she had seen visions of Rei all the time like Shinji had.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 15, 2007 7:23 pm Although there are precedents pointing to Asuka seeing a Rei before she bought the farm, seeing as how she's a participant in pre-3I instrumentality. But during that "I'll kill you" scene, what indication do we have that she is NOT talking about the harpies flying around above her that just utterly defeated her in her moment of (false) rebirth?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 15, 2007 9:16 pm Agree with what OC said. Asuka--as you all should know if you don't--is a prideful character. She is NOT one to admit defeat, not after (falsely :() thinking she's regained her Reason To Be (nigoki), espeically at the thought/realzation she's very well near death, a fear of hers. (See 25: The Case of Soryu Asuka Langley and 25': Emergency Evacuation to Regression)

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Sat Mar 17, 2007 4:09 pm Ornette wrote: But during that "I'll kill you" scene, what indication do we have that she is NOT talking about the harpies flying around above her that just utterly defeated her in her moment of (false) rebirth?

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Sun Mar 18, 2007 6:48 pm Even with all the code and encryptions we have in Eva, Anno would not leave out such a groundbreaking scene of Rei appearing to a soon to have her Eva completely destroyed Asuka, If thats what indeed happened. The fact she was so passionately engaged in battle with the Eva series and finding herself defeated because her power supply ran out would drive a person like her the brink of insanity. Kinda like someone losing due to a power failure when on the final boss of a non-save able game. She simply saw the Eva series flying above her, openly mocking her and wished for nothing more in the world, then to just kill them all.

[]: Re: a couple of questions....             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Mar 23, 2007 1:00 am Jamie the Great wrote: 1.) In EoE when the Eva series tears Asuka apart and she is trying to go berserk she keeps repeating, "I'll kill you," but to me what she see's outside of her Eva looks a bit different then what is actually happening. You don't see the Eva series flying above her for example. So, if that is the case, and she isn't really talking about the Eva's then who do you think it is? Is she seeing Rei like everyone else did before they died (assuming Asuka does die in this scene) or could it possibly be her mother, who told Asuka that she wouldn't let her die (thus causing Asuka to find the will to live) but sadly that seems to be a lie....

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Mar 23, 2007 2:22 am maybe she was trying to kill penpen.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Mar 23, 2007 2:24 am slothen wrote: maybe she was trying to kill penpen.

[]: Re: a couple of questions....             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Mar 23, 2007 2:39 am Jamie the Great wrote: ...Like it happened when he tried to rescue Rei and got Adam on his palm...

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Mar 23, 2007 5:55 pm the life of Adam must suck, being stuck on an old perverts hand.

[]: Re: a couple of questions....             Quote Post by Jamie the Great » Tue Mar 27, 2007 2:11 pm Oh yeah, that part with Kaji totally slipped my mind... :?

[]:             Quote Post by SoryuUberAlles » Wed Mar 28, 2007 2:31 pm If it's the Evas, the words "I'llkillyouI'llkillyouI'llkillyou" have never been more heartbreaking. Whatever the truth, I don't think I'll interpret it any other way.

[]:             Quote Post by Jamie the Great » Fri Apr 06, 2007 3:41 am Okay I have a new question (or observation) I was on Wiki and it said that the Forbidden Fruit might actually be meat. "However, as man was given permission to eat all the fruits of the garden, it has been proposed that the forbidden fruit was animal flesh, since this act introduced death into the Garden and, more importantly, breaks the second commandment[2] given to Adam and Eve in the Book of Genesis, that is, to be vegetarian." So maybe I am over-analyizing this but do you think this has a connection to Rei not likeing meat?
